mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in FEDFUNDS raises the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows and signals a tightening liquidity environment, producing below-average S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days during hiking cycles.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 0.2% in March 2022 immediately following Fed liftoff, marking start of tightening cycle
failure_condition: 20-day forward SPX returns during FEDFUNDS-rising periods are not significantly below the unconditional historical mean (t-test p > 0.05) across multiple hiking episodes.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation crosses above 8%, markets rapidly reprice expectations of more aggressive Fed tightening, triggering a short-horizon risk-off move that produces negative S&P 500 returns over the following 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value 287.708 in March 2022 reflecting accelerating multi-decade-high inflation
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns following CPI YoY crossing above 8% are positive or statistically indistinguishable from baseline in more than 55% of instances across the sample.

mechanism_narrative: A rising FEDFUNDS trend combined with UNRATE below 4% jointly indicates an overheated labor market forcing the Fed toward a more aggressive tightening path than markets have priced, raising recession odds and driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 3.6% in March 2022 alongside Fed rate liftoff
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with tight labor market
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns conditional on the joint trigger are not significantly more negative than returns conditional on FEDFUNDS rising alone (difference-in-means test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: During a monetary tightening regime, a decline in HOUST reflects weakening interest-rate-sensitive housing demand and forewarns broader economic slowdown, generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days; this relationship is absent or reversed when FEDFUNDS is flat or falling.
candidate_trigger: HOUST declines more than 5% over 3 months while FEDFUNDS is rising
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST revised value 1735K in February 2022 amid rising rate expectations
failure_condition: Negative HOUST readings during tightening regimes fail to precede below-average 20-day SPX returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or the effect disappears when tested outside tightening regimes as predicted.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month acceleration in INDPRO signals robust near-term industrial output and corporate earnings momentum, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the following 5 trading days as investors extrapolate improving fundamentals.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value 104.5853 in March 2022 indicating continued industrial expansion
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO month-over-month change and 5-day forward SPX returns falls below 0.02 over any rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS nominal growth falls below CPIAUCSL inflation, implying real retail sales contraction, this triggers medium-term demand destruction concerns among investors, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS YoY growth minus CPIAUCSL YoY growth < 0
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS revised value 651027 million in March 2022 against elevated CPI readings, compressing real consumption growth
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns following negative real-retail-sales-growth signals are not significantly more negative than unconditional returns (p > 0.05) across at least three separate episodes.

mechanism_narrative: When the real policy rate (FEDFUNDS minus CPIAUCSL YoY inflation) is deeply negative, cheap real financing costs support equity valuations and produce positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days; as tightening pushes the real rate toward zero or positive, this tailwind reverses into a headwind.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 0.2% versus CPI YoY well above 8%, implying deeply negative real policy rate in March 2022
regime_hint: negative real interest rate regime transitioning toward positive
failure_condition: 60-day forward SPX returns during deeply negative real-rate periods are not significantly higher than returns when the real rate approaches zero or positive (t-test p > 0.05), or the sign flips as the regime transitions but returns do not follow.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous deceleration in INDPRO growth and persistently elevated CPIAUCSL inflation constitutes a stagflation signature that compresses corporate margins and real output expectations, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month annualized growth < 1% AND CPIAUCSL YoY growth > 7%
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage 287.708 in March 2022 alongside decelerating industrial production growth signals
failure_condition: 20-day forward SPX returns conditional on the joint INDPRO/CPI trigger are not significantly more negative than returns conditional on high CPI alone (difference-in-means test p > 0.05).
